name: Cargo / container gate-in cutoff
applies_when: containerized ocean shipment has assigned sailing or vessel booking
default_deadline_assumption: carrier/terminal specific; commonly days before sailing, do not infer exact time without schedule source
hard_gate_condition: container_ready_datetime or terminal_gate_in_time is after gate_in_cutoff_datetime
readiness_message: Container misses terminal gate-in cutoff; it cannot be loaded on that sailing unless carrier/terminal grants exception.

name: VGM cutoff
applies_when: packed export container subject to SOLAS VGM
default_deadline_assumption: must be submitted before the carrier/terminal VGM cutoff and before vessel loading
hard_gate_condition: VGM missing or submitted after VGM cutoff
readiness_message: No timely VGM means no load for that sailing.

name: Shipping instructions / documentation cutoff
applies_when: ocean shipment requires bill of lading or sea waybill generation
default_deadline_assumption: carrier/sailing specific; must be validated per booking
hard_gate_condition: shipping instructions missing or submitted after carrier documentation cutoff
readiness_message: Late shipping instructions can block B/L creation and cause shipment roll or documentation failure.

name: Dangerous goods document cutoff
default_deadline_assumption: carrier/sailing specific; often earlier than standard documentation cutoff
hard_gate_condition: DG declaration or required DG packing certificate missing/late
readiness_message: DG paperwork must be accepted before cargo can be planned for vessel stowage.

name: Missed service-cycle impact
default_deadline_assumption: if service_frequency_days unknown, weekly container service estimate = 7 days with low confidence
hard_gate_condition: none; missing a sailing is a delay/cost planning factor unless cargo has a fixed latest acceptable arrival date
readiness_message: Missing a weekly ocean service usually loses a service cycle, not a few hours.

name: Demurrage / terminal free-time risk
applies_when: full import container remains in terminal beyond free time
default_deadline_assumption: free time and tariff are carrier/country/terminal specific
hard_gate_condition: none by default; may become operational block if charges/holds prevent release
readiness_message: Pickup after free time expiry can trigger demurrage/storage charges.

name: Detention / equipment free-time risk
applies_when: empty container is returned after agreed free time
default_deadline_assumption: free time and tariff are carrier/country/terminal specific
hard_gate_condition: none by default; may become cost or equipment-release issue
readiness_message: Late empty return can trigger detention charges.
